keyEvents.text: Kristian Javier (British Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Dominica 1, British Virgin Islands 0. Audel Laville (Dominica) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Eustace Marshall.
